creator: jeffrey_in_nyc
caption:
Would you take this Fun Day Trip from NYC!? 1 Hour train ride from Penn Station to One of the Largest Outlets on the East Coast

*transit details and location are pinned in the comments*

#nyc #NewYork #shopping #travel #daytrip

transcription.text: Did you know you can take a one-hour train from Manhattan to one of the largest outlet centers on the East Coast? And let me just say, this place is massive with over 100 stores where you can get amazing deals for 40 to 60% off on things like Ralph Lauren, Sephora, Brooks Brothers, Timberland, Vineyard Vines, Swarovski, Zales, Oakley, Crocs, Calvin Klein, Tommy Hilfiger, and they even have a giant movie theater with food spots and plenty of benches and courtyards to sit out and enjoy the spring weather. This is Tanger Outlets in Deer Park, New York.
